# Krishi Setu

> Agricultural services platform for Maharashtra farmers: equipment rental, live market prices, weather forecasts, AI-powered crop advice, and government schemes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Krishi Setu services for farmers and equipment owners.
- [Equipment](/equipment): Browse and rent farming equipment from verified owners.
- [Market Prices](/market-prices): Live APMC crop market prices across districts.
- [Weather](/weather): District-level weather and 7-day farming forecasts.
- [Crop Calendar](/crop-calendar): Seasonal sowing, irrigation, and harvest schedules.
- [Compare Crops](/crop-comparison): Side-by-side suitability comparison for crops.
- [Government Schemes](/government-schemes): Discover and check eligibility for farmer schemes.
- [Helpline](/helpline): Support and assistance for platform users.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Authentication for farmers, equipment owners, and admins.
